mapper.select: SELECT FAQ_ID as faqId, QESTN_SJ as qestnSj, QESTN_CN as qestnCn, ANSWER_CN as answerCn, RDCNT as inqireCo, ATCH_FILE_ID as atchFileId, DATE_FORMAT(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as frstRegisterPnttm , FRST_REGISTER_ID as frstRegisterId, DATE_FORMAT(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as lastUpdusrPnttm , LAST_UPDUSR_ID as lastUpdusrId FROM LETTNFAQINFO WHERE FAQ_ID=#{faqId}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM LETTNFAQINFO WHERE 1=1
AND QESTN_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LETTNFAQINFO (FAQ_ID , QESTN_SJ , QESTN_CN , ANSWER_CN , RDCNT , ATCH_FILE_ID , FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID , LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID) VALUES ( #{faqId} , #{qestnSj} , #{qestnCn} , #{answerCn} , 0 , #{atchFileId} , sysdate() , #{frstRegisterId} , sysdate() , #{lastUpdusrId} )
